title: Marbella Private Catamaran Charter Sunset Guide 2026
html:
For a memorable evening on the Costa del Sol, a private catamaran charter at sunset in Marbella offers a serene escape on the Mediterranean Sea. Most tours depart from Puerto Banús and cost from around €800 to €2,500 for a private group, depending on the vessel and duration. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators for this experience.

Where to set off in Marbella

Puerto Banús is the main hub for luxury charters, with berths for superyachts and catamarans. Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, also known as La Bajadilla, offers a quieter alternative. The bay of Marbella stretches from Cabopino Marina in the east to the cliffs of Calaburras in the west. Nearby towns such as San Pedro Alcántara provide additional launching points, and the island of Isla de las Palomas is a popular anchorage. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

How much does it cost to rent a catamaran for sunset in Marbella?

Prices for a private catamaran charter in Marbella range from €800 to €2,500 for a three-hour sunset trip. The cost depends on the size and luxury level of the catamaran. You can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to find the best option for your group.

Which boat to rent for a private sunset charter

  1. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 46) for stable sailing and social space, up to 12 guests, from €1,200.
  2. Motor yacht (e.g. Sunseeker Predator 72) for speed and luxury, up to 10 guests, from €1,800. See the Sunseeker Predator 72 for hire on BoatHire24.
  3. Sailing yacht (e.g. Astondoa 57) for a classic sail experience, up to 8 guests, from €1,000.
  4. RIB (e.g. Axopar 45) for a sporty and intimate outing, up to 6 guests, from €800.

How much does a boat charter cost in Marbella?

Boat hire costs in Marbella vary widely by type and duration, from €100 per person to €2,500 for a private yacht. A shared catamaran sunset tour costs around €80 to €150 per person for half a day. A small motorboat, such as a 6-metre RIB, is available from €300 for a half-day rental. A full-day catamaran charter for up to 12 guests typically costs between €1,500 and €2,500. A crewed luxury yacht, such as an Azimut 55, can exceed €3,000 for a full day.

When is the best season to charter a catamaran in Marbella?

The peak season for sunset charters in Marbella runs from June to September, with warm weather and low winds. The local Poniente wind (west wind) is common during summer afternoons, making for a gentle sail. The rest of the year offers mild conditions, though the Levante wind (east wind) can bring choppier seas. You can find available boats using the boat search on BoatHire24.

When booking a sunset charter in Marbella, aim to depart 90 minutes before sunset to allow time to reach a scenic spot west of the coast, such as the cliffs of Cabo Pino.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella?

In Spain, you generally need a Patrón de Navegación Básica (PNB) licence to rent a boat over 6 metres without a skipper. However, most sunset charters include a licensed captain as part of the package. Always check with the operator for exact requirements; BoatHire24 listings specify whether a licence is needed.

At a glance

  • Price band: €800 to €2,500 per group
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 3 to 4 hours
  • Guest capacity: 6 to 12
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

What is included in a private catamaran charter?

Most include a skipper, fuel, safety equipment, and often a welcome drink; food and premium drinks may be extra.

Can I bring my own food and drink on a catamaran charter in Marbella?

Yes, many operators allow you to bring your own provisions, but check the terms in advance.

Is the sunset charter suitable for children?

Yes, catamarans offer stable decks and are family-friendly, with life jackets provided for all ages.

How far do sunset charters typically go from Marbella?

Trips often cover up to 10 nautical miles along the coast, with stops at coves like Cala de la Viuda.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. If you own a vessel, consider using the platform to rent out your boat to visitors seeking unforgettable evening experiences on the Mediterranean in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
